    All the world will know     you are my dis - ciples by the love that you offer, the

 [Em7]kindness you [A]show.        [A]You have [B]heard the voice of [Em]God in the words that I have
| D               | Bm            |C              | FM7      Bb | Asus4 A |
spoken. You be - held heaven’s glory and have seen the face of God.

|D        GM7          | Ax | xF#            | Bm           |G       | D       |
    I must leave you now           only for a moment. I must go to my Father to
                sus4
| Em7        |A      A         | B            | Em      | Ax              |
 make you a home. On the day of my re - turn I will come to take you
|D             | Bm          | C                   | FM7     Bb     | Asus4 A |

|D       GM7 | Ax | xF#                        | Bm             |G          | D           |

|D                    | Bm          | C               | FM7      Bb      | Asus4 A |
  in you. You can count on my mercy when you ask for what you need.
title: As I have done for you |4| CAPO 3 SCHUTTE aTWunG_lUrE - readableMusic.com

As I have done for you |4| CAPO 3 SCHUTTE aTWunG_lUrE - readableMusic.com

                                                   oooo

                        oooo               sus4
INTRO:  | D        |      | Em7 D | A            A | 
REFRAIN: | D                 | oooo | A7                 |D            |
             I, your Lord and Master, now become your servant.
| Bm               | G          C      | Em                | Asus4 A |
  I who made the moon and stars will kneel to wash your feet.
| D             | oooo       | A7          | Dsus4 D |
This is my commandment: to love as I have loved you.
| Bm               | G       Em7 | Asus4    A        | Dsus4 D |
Kneel to wash each other’s feet as I have done for you.
                                           oooo
                              FINAL: | D         | ooo3 A | D Dsus4 | D          |

|D           GM7 | Ax | xF#                    | Bm          |G             |D          |
    All the world will know     you are my dis - ciples by the love that you offer, the
                    sus4
| Em7          | A       A         | B                 | Em        | Ax               |
 kindness you show.        You have heard the voice of God in the words that I have
| D               | Bm            |C              | FM7      Bb | Asus4 A |
spoken. You be - held heaven’s glory and have seen the face of God.

|D        GM7          | Ax | xF#            | Bm           |G       | D       |
    I must leave you now           only for a moment. I must go to my Father to
                sus4
| Em7        |A      A         | B            | Em      | Ax              |
 make you a home. On the day of my re - turn I will come to take you
|D             | Bm          | C                   | FM7     Bb     | Asus4 A |
with me to the place I have promised where your joy will have no end.

|D       GM7 | Ax | xF#                        | Bm             |G          | D           |
     I am like a vine          you are like the branches. If you cling to my teaching you
                 sus4
| Em7        |A       A         | B                 | Em      | Ax                 |
  surely will live       If you make your home in me, I will come to dwell with-
|D                    | Bm          | C               | FM7      Bb      | Asus4 A |
  in you. You can count on my mercy when you ask for what you need.
